theme: A dark dungeon maze crawling with goblins. The player is a hero/knight who becomes a Paladin with a golden aura.

assets.description: A dark, atmospheric stone dungeon floor texture suitable for a maze background.
A heroic knight character. 3x3 sprite sheet showing idle, walk, and attack poses. 64x64 tiles.
A small, green, menacing goblin. 3x3 sprite sheet. 64x64 tiles.
Magical word orbs. 1x3 sheet showing standard and glowing states. 64x64 tiles.
